description: Return-Path, SPF smtp.mailfrom, and From all name the same domain (example.com) on an otherwise clean, trusted, all-passing message. returnPathDomainMatchesFromDomain and smtpMailfromDomainMatchesFromDomain are true, envelopeSenderDomainsAgree is true, and no envelope-sender signal is emitted. Demonstrates the quiet baseline the consistency rules must not disturb.

authentication-results: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

authenticationResults.raw: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com
